project_privacy_data_flows.description: Background worker polls for unread Wikipedia notifications via Echo extension API. Notifications include talk page messages, mention alerts, and thank-you notes. Requires login.

flow_steps.code: fun schedulePollNotificationJob(context: Context) { val constraints = Constraints.Builder().setRequiredNetworkType(NetworkType.CONNECTED).build(); val workRequest = OneTimeWorkRequestBuilder<PollNotificationWorker>().setConstraints(constraints).build() }
flow_steps.details: One-time work request scheduled via WorkManager with network connectivity constraint.

flow_steps.code: private suspend fun retrieveNotifications() { val response = ServiceFactory.get(WikipediaApp.instance.wikiSite).getAllNotifications("!read", null) }
flow_steps.details: Fetches all unread notifications from Echo API across all wikis.

flow_steps.code: @GET(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=query&meta=notifications&notformat=model&notlimit=max&notwikis=*") suspend fun getAllNotifications(@Query("notfilter") filter: String?, @Query("notcontinue") continueStr: String?)
flow_steps.details: Echo notification data fetched from all wikis. Includes notification content, types, and timestamps.
Polls for last unread notification timestamp to detect new notifications.

flow_steps.code: @FormUrlEncoded @POST(MW_API_PREFIX + "action=echopushsubscriptions&command=create&provider=fcm") suspend fun subscribePush(@Field("token") csrfToken: String, @Field("providertoken") providerToken: String)
flow_steps.details: FCM push token registered with MediaWiki Echo service for push notifications.
Firebase Cloud Messaging service receives push notification payloads from Wikipedia servers.
Processes notification list and creates Android notifications for each unread item.
